feed.title: democloid
feed.subtitle: Site containing information related to current interests, I'll post here whenever I have something interesting to say.

entry.title: Hello world!
entry.content:
I’ve been wanting to share some of the stuff I do for a while, but for one reason or another I’ve never really done it. I’m setting up this blog in order to potentially share some stuff. I might never share anything tho… ¯\(ツ)/¯

Time will tell, for the moment, setting the blog up is a first step.
entry.summary: I’ve been wanting to share some of the stuff I do for a while, but for one reason or another I’ve never really done it. I’m setting up this blog in order to potentially share some stuff. I might never share anything tho… ¯\(ツ)/¯
